sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in source material

special_mechanics.name: jumping_and_running
special_mechanics.description: Core platforming mechanic; player performs a lot of running and jumping across horizontally scrolling and stationary screens

special_mechanics.name: combat_actions
special_mechanics.description: Player can punch and kick enemies in stationary screen combat segments

special_mechanics.name: weapon_systems
special_mechanics.description: Armed with gun and can pick up ammo; can throw hand grenades from Ferrari; uses sniper rifle for shooting sequences

tier_notes: Tier 3 (qualitative/empirical) - Only gameplay description and mechanics overview available. No quantitative physics parameters documented in source material. Game features multiple gameplay styles (scrolling action, stationary combat, 3D stages, maze navigation, sniper sequences) but specific movement physics are not detailed.
